scripts.test:navigation: tsc src/_dev-harness/navigation/logic.ts --module commonjs --target es2020 --lib es2020,dom --rootDir src/_dev-harness/navigation --outDir .tmp-navigation && node tests/_dev-harness/navigationLogic.test.js
scripts.test:auth: tsc src/_dev-harness/auth/logic.ts --module commonjs --target es2020 --lib es2020,dom --rootDir src --outDir .tmp-harness-auth && node tests/_dev-harness/authLogic.test.js
scripts.test:onboarding: tsc src/_dev-harness/onboarding/logic.ts --module commonjs --target es2020 --lib es2020,dom --rootDir src --outDir .tmp-harness-onboarding && node tests/_dev-harness/onboardingLogic.test.js
scripts.test:growth: tsc src/_dev-harness/growth/logic.ts --module commonjs --target es2020 --lib es2020,dom --rootDir src --outDir .tmp-harness-growth && node tests/_dev-harness/growthLogic.test.js
scripts.test:settings: tsc src/_dev-harness/settings/logic.ts --module commonjs --target es2020 --lib es2020,dom --rootDir src --outDir .tmp-settings && node tests/_dev-harness/settingsLogic.test.js
scripts.test:chat: tsc src/features/chat/logic.ts src/features/chat/data.ts src/features/chat/types.ts --module commonjs --target es2020 --lib es2020,dom --rootDir src --outDir .tmp-chat && node tests/_dev-harness/chatLogic.test.js
